name: get_municipality_boundary
description: Returns the boundary of a municipality. Includes 'wkt' string and 'bbox' (Bounding Box).

province.description: Province or Metropolitan City the municipality belongs to. ONLY IN ITALIAN

municipality.description: Exact name of the municipality. ONLY IN ITALIAN

name: get_service_categories
description:
Retrieves the list of valid Service Categories from the Snap4City Knowledge Base.
Use this tool to find the correct category names required for search tools.

mode.description: Determines the granularity of the categories returned. 'macro' returns only main high-level categories (e.g., Healthcare). 'detailed' returns specific subcategory (e.g., Hospital).

name: address_search_location
description:
Locator swagger Searches for a specific address or poi by text, on snap4city database.
Returns a GeoJSON FeatureCollection containing the geographic coordinates.

search.description: The address, street, or place name to search for (e.g., 'Via Roma, Firenze'). Mandatory.

logic.description: Logical operator to combine search terms. Use 'and' for stricter results, 'or' for broader.

excludePOI.description: If true, excludes Points of Interest (POI), set to false ONLY when street are required

maxresults.description: Maximum number of results to return. set it high to have broader research

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: distance_from_coordinates
description:
Calculates the Haversine distance in meters between two GPS coordinates.
Returns the distance in meters.

sourcelatitude.description: Latitude of the starting position in decimal degrees (e.g., 45.4642). Range: -90 to 90.

sourcelongitude.description: Longitude of the starting position in decimal degrees (e.g., 9.1900). Range: -180 to 180.

destinationlatitude.description: Latitude of the destination position in decimal degrees. Range: -90 to 90.

destinationlongitude.description: Longitude of the destination position in decimal degrees. Range: -180 to 180.

name: coordinates_to_address
description:
Retrieves address information (reverse geocoding) for a specific GPS point.
Returns a JSON containing address details like street, city, and country.

latitude.description: Latitude of the GPS point to reverse geocode. Range: -90 to 90.

longitude.description: Longitude of the GPS point to reverse geocode. Range: -180 to 180.

name: service_info_dev
description:
Retrieves detailed information and realtime data about a specific service using its Service URI.
Returns a GeoJSON description including main properties and time-varying data if available.

serviceuri.description: The full URI of the service (e.g., 'http://...'). This is the unique identifier for the service.

fromtime.description: Start time for retrieving realtime data. Formats: 'n-day', 'n-hour', 'n-minute' or 'yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss' (ISO 8601).

totime.description: End time for retrieving realtime data. Format: 'yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss' (ISO 8601).

valuename.description: Filter response by a specific value name if the service provides multiple values.

lang.description: Language code for descriptions. If the requested language is not available, English is returned.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if the service requires it.

name: service_info
description:
Retrieves detailed information about a specific service using its Service URI.
Returns a GeoJSON description containing main properties (name, address, type) and realtime data if available.

serviceuri.description: The full Service URI (e.g., 'http://...') to retrieve information for. This field is mandatory.

lang.description: ISO 2-char language code for descriptions. Defaults to 'en' if the specific language is not available.

authentication.description: Optional Bearer token for authorization if the service requires it.

name: routing
description:
Calculates the best route between two GPS coordinates based on the selected transportation mode.
Returns routing information including path, duration, and instructions.

startlatitude.description: Latitude of the starting point. Range: -90 to 90.

startlongitude.description: Longitude of the starting point. Range: -180 to 180.

endlatitude.description: Latitude of the destination point. Range: -90 to 90.

endlongitude.description: Longitude of the destination point. Range: -180 to 180.

startdatetime.description: Date and time of the journey. Formats accepted: 'DD/MM/YYYY, HH:MM', ISO 8601, etc. Defaults to current time if omitted.

name: wkt_to_geojson
description:
Converts a Well-Known Text (WKT) geometry string into a GeoJSON object.
Returns the GeoJSON dictionary including the bounding box (bbox).

wkt.description: The Well-Known Text (WKT) string representation of the geometry (e.g., 'POINT(30 10)').

name: geojson_to_wkt
description:
Converts a GeoJSON string representation into Well-Known Text (WKT) format.
Returns a dictionary containing the WKT string.

geojson.description: The GeoJSON string to be converted (e.g., '{"type": "Point", "coordinates": [30, 10]}').

name: point_within_polygon
description:
Checks if a specific GPS point is located inside a given Polygon (WKT format).
Returns a boolean result indicating if the point is inside the polygon area.

pointlatitude.description: Latitude of the point to check. Range: -90 to 90.

pointlongitude.description: Longitude of the point to check. Range: -180 to 180.

polygon.description: The Polygon geometry described as a Well-Known Text (WKT) string (e.g., 'POLYGON((...))').

name: service_search_along_path
description:
Retrieves a set of services located near or along a given GPS path (WKT).
Useful for finding amenities along a route.

path.description: The geographic path described as a Well-Known Text (WKT) string (e.g., 'LINESTRING(11.2 43.7, 11.3 43.8)').

categories.description: Semicolon-separated list of categories or macro-categories to filter (e.g., 'Accommodation;Healthcare'). Defaults to 'Service' (all), use get_service_categories to fetch all possible service

maxresults.description: Maximum number of results to be returned. Set to 0 for all results.

model.description: Filter for IoT devices created with a specific model name.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: service_search_within_polygon
description:
Retrieves a set of services and devices contained within a specified WKT Polygon area.
Ideal for geofencing or searching within specific district boundaries.

polygon.description: The geographic area described as a Well-Known Text (WKT) Polygon (e.g., 'POLYGON((11.2 43.7, 11.3 43.7, 11.3 43.8, 11.2 43.7))').

categories.description: Semicolon-separated list of categories or macro-categories to filter (e.g., 'Accommodation;Healthcare'). Defaults to 'Service'.

maxresults.description: Maximum number of results to be returned. Set to 0 for all results.

model.description: Filter for IoT devices created with a specific model name.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: service_search_near_gps_position
description:
Retrieves a set of services or iot-device near a GPS position.
Returns a complex structure including an array of URIs, raw grouped GeoJSON, and flattened GeoJSON.

latitude.description: Latitude of the center GPS position. Range: -90 to 90.

longitude.description: Longitude of the center GPS position. Range: -180 to 180.

maxdistance.description: Maximum search radius in Km (e.g., '0.5' == 500 m). Use 'inside' to search for geometries containing the point.

categories.description: Semicolon-separated list of categories to filter. Omit to return all.

values.description: Semicolon-separated list of value names to return for each service.

maxresults.description: Maximum number of results to return.

model.description: Filter for IoT devices created with a specific model name.

typeQuery.description: Specify 'entity' to search for IoT devices instead of services.

geometry.description: If true, returns a 'hasGeometry' property for complex WKT geometries.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: service_search_near_service
description:
Retrieves a set of services or iot-device that are near a specific service (using its serviceUri).
Returns a complex structure including an array of URIs, raw grouped GeoJSON, and flattened GeoJSON.

serviceuri.description: The URI of the central service (e.g., http://www.disit.org/km4city/resource/...). Mandatory.

categories.description: Semicolon-separated list of categories to filter. Omit to return all.

values.description: Semicolon-separated list of value names to return for each service.

maxresults.description: Maximum number of results to return.

model.description: Filter for IoT devices created with a specific model name.

typeQuery.description: Specify 'entity' to search for IoT devices instead of services.

geometry.description: If true, returns a 'hasGeometry' property for complex WKT geometries.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: service_search_within_gps_area
description:
Retrieves a set of services or iot-device within a given GPS Area (Bounding Box).
Returns a complex structure including an array of URIs, raw grouped GeoJSON, and flattened GeoJSON.

latitudebottomleft.description: Bottom-Left Latitude of the bounding box.

longitudebottomleft.description: Bottom-Left Longitude of the bounding box.

latitudetopright.description: Top-Right Latitude of the bounding box.

longitudetopright.description: Top-Right Longitude of the bounding box.

categories.description: Semicolon-separated list of categories to filter.

values.description: Semicolon-separated list of value names to return for each service.

maxresults.description: Maximum number of results to return.

model.description: Filter for IoT devices created with a specific model name.

typeQuery.description: Specify 'entity' to search for IoT devices instead of services.

geometry.description: If true, returns a 'hasGeometry' property for complex WKT geometries.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: transport_routes_search_near_gps_position
description:
Retrieves a list of public transport routes (buses, trams) that have a stop in a specified GPS area.
Returns a JSON Object containing route details including lineNumber, routeUri, direction, agency, and polyline.

latitude.description: Latitude of the center GPS position. Range: -90 to 90.

longitude.description: Longitude of the center GPS position. Range: -180 to 180.

agency.description: URI of an agency to restrict the search to a specified transport operator.

maxdistance.description: Maximum search radius in Km (e.g., '0.1'). Use 'inside' to search for geometries containing the point.

maxresults.description: Maximum number of results to return. Set to 0 for all results.

geometry.description: If true, returns a 'hasGeometry' property and 'polyline' (WKT geometry) for each route.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: transport_routes_search_within_gps_area
description:
Retrieves a list of public transport routes (buses, trams) that have a stop in a specified rectangular area.
Returns a JSON Object containing route details including lineNumber, routeUri, direction, agency, and polyline.

latitudebottomleft.description: Bottom-Left Latitude of the bounding box.

longitudebottomleft.description: Bottom-Left Longitude of the bounding box.

latitudetopright.description: Top-Right Latitude of the bounding box.

longitudetopright.description: Top-Right Longitude of the bounding box.

agency.description: URI of an agency to restrict the search to a specified transport operator.

maxresults.description: Maximum number of results to return. Set to 0 for all results.

geometry.description: If true, returns a 'hasGeometry' property and 'polyline' (WKT geometry) for each route.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: transport_routes_search_within_wkt_area
description:
Retrieves a list of public transport routes (buses, trams) that have a stop in a specified WKT geometric area.
Returns a JSON Object containing route details including lineNumber, routeUri, direction, agency, and polyline.

wktarea.description: A geographic area described as Well-Known Text (WKT) (e.g., 'POLYGON((...))'). Mandatory.

agency.description: URI of an agency to restrict the search to a specified transport operator.

maxresults.description: Maximum number of results to return. Set to 0 for all results.

geometry.description: If true, returns a 'hasGeometry' property and 'polyline' (WKT geometry) for each route.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: tpl_agencies
description:
Retrieves a list of public transport agencies available on Snap4City.
Returns a dictionary containing an array of agency objects with their names and URIs.

authentication.description: Bearer token or Access Token for authorization if required.

name: tpl_lines
description:
Provides a list of the public transport lines available for a given transport agency.
Returns an array of JSON objects containing line details (long name, short name, URI).

agency.description: The URI of the public transport agency (e.g., 'http://www.disit.org/km4city/resource/AtF'). Mandatory.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: tpl_routes_by_line
description:
Provides a list of the public transport routes available for a given line (and optionally agency).
Returns an array of JSON objects containing route details, including the WKT geometry.

line.description: URI or shortName of a public transport line. Mandatory.

agency.description: URI of the transport agency. If the 'line' parameter is a full URI, this is not needed.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: tpl_stops_by_route
description:
Retrieves a list of public transport stops available for a given route.
Returns a list containing two elements: an array of service URIs (the stops) and the full GeoJSON data.

route.description: URI of the route whose bus stops are to be retrieved. Mandatory.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: tpl_stop_timeline
description:
Retrieves the timetable/timeline (scheduled arrivals and departures) for a specific public transport stop.
Returns a simplified list of scheduled events.

stop.description: The Service URI of the public transport stop. Mandatory.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.

name: tpl_routes_by_stop
description:
Retrieves a list of public transport routes that pass through a specific bus stop.
Returns an array of JSON objects containing route details, including the WKT geometry.

stop.description: The Service URI of the public transport stop to find routes for. Mandatory.

authentication.description: Bearer token for authorization if required.
